title: Hackescher Markt - Quick Summary
items: **Hackescher Markt is not just a pretty square:** it sits between old Berlin, Jewish Berlin, East Berlin and the restored post-1989 Mitte.
**The Hackesche Hoefe opened in 1906:** the eight-courtyard complex shows how Berlin mixed housing, workshops, shops and culture in one dense block.
**The deepest destruction began before the bombing:** Nazi persecution shattered Jewish life around Spandauer Vorstadt and Scheunenviertel.
**Reunification changed the area fast:** restoration saved buildings, but it also turned Hackescher Markt into one of central Berlin's most marketable districts.
**Best way to read it:** walk the station, Hackesche Hoefe, Haus Schwarzenberg, Neue Synagoge and Spree instead of judging it from one cafe terrace.
